expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus and includes scenarios that compare linked vs non-linked cells: "Modern grid hyperlink-style coverage: scenarios must separate contextual-link styling ... from ordinary element rendering" and scenarios such as "Contextual-link cell is visually distinguishable from a normal cell" with checks for hyperlink styling/icon vs ordinary rendering/no icon.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md declares "Primary phase under test: Phase 4a" and presents a "Phase 4a-aligned subcategory scenarios (XMindMark-style outline)" with subcategory-first, scenario/step style content; it also notes: "This phase4a content is intentionally subcategory-first and avoids canonical top-layer categories."
